---
title: "Autres liens"
---



## [Université du Québec à Montréal (UQAM)](https://uqam.ca/)

- [Service de la vie étudiante](https://sve.uqam.ca/)
- [Département de mathématiques](https://math.uqam.ca/)
- [Informations sur les études en actuariat](https://actuariat.uqam.ca/)

## Revues scientifiques

- [Annals of Actuarial Sciences](https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/annals-of-actuarial-science)
- [ASTIN Bulletin](https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/astin-bulletin-journal-of-the-iaa)
- [European Actuarial Journal](https://link.springer.com/journal/13385)
- [Insurance: Mathematics and Economics](https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/insurance-mathematics-and-economics)
- [Journal of Risk and Insurance](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/15396975)
- [North American Actuarial Journal](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/uaaj20)
- [Scandinavian Actuarial Journal](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/sact20)
- [Variance](https://www.casact.org/variance)

## Autres

- [Co-operators](https://www.cooperators.ca/)
- [Association des actuaires IARD](https://app.amilia.com/store/fr/aaiard/shop/programs)
